name: PowerPoint Processor
description: Create, edit, and analyze PowerPoint presentations using Anthropic's production document skill. Supports slide layout management, speaker notes, charts, and template-based creation. This skill underlies Claude's native .pptx capabilities on claude.ai.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Source-available (not open source) — production document skill powering Claude's .pptx file capabilities. Python scripts for slide generation, cleaning, and thumbnailing. Verified at skills/pptx/ in the repo tree.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
